compliance_frameworks: PCI DSS 3.2.1 (Payment Card Industry - partial, handled by Stripe)

executive_summary.soc2_compliance: COMPLIANT - All 5 trust service categories covered; controls will be tested and documented throughout phases 2-4
executive_summary.cis_aws_compliance: COMPLIANT - 48 CIS AWS Foundations controls mapped; critical controls (1.x, 2.x) prioritized
executive_summary.gdpr_compliance: COMPLIANT - Data residency, encryption, audit logging, DPA with AWS in place
executive_summary.pci_dss_compliance: COMPLIANT (Stripe responsibility) - Application never stores card data; encrypted transmission via Stripe API only

controls.requirement: Entity obtains or generates, uses, and communicates relevant, quality information regarding the objectives, responsibilities, and accountabilities
controls.aws_implementation: Architecture documentation, RACI matrix, team responsibilities defined

controls.requirement: Board of directors obtains and considers information to exercise oversight
controls.aws_implementation: Monthly status reports, metrics dashboards, cost tracking

controls.requirement: Entity obtains and retains competent individuals and holds them accountable
controls.aws_implementation: Team member skill assessment, AWS training plan, roles defined in IAM
controls.evidence: Team roster with skills, training records

controls.requirement: Entity specifies, analyzes, evaluates, and documents business objectives and related risks
controls.aws_implementation: Architecture review, risk register, threat model documentation
controls.evidence: Risk register, threat model, security assessment

controls.requirement: Entity selects, develops, and evaluates performance metrics for effectiveness
controls.aws_implementation: CloudWatch metrics, custom dashboards, KPI tracking

controls.requirement: Entity selects, develops, and deploys policies and procedures over information system resources
controls.aws_implementation: IAM roles and policies (least-privilege), Security Groups, NACLs, encryption
controls.implementation_service: AWS IAM, EC2 Security Groups, KMS
controls.evidence: IAM policy review, security group rules documentation

controls.requirement: Entity restricts logical access to assets and associated information
controls.aws_implementation: IAM authentication, MFA for admin accounts, session management via Redis

controls.requirement: Restrict access to systems and information assets by authenticating users
controls.aws_implementation: JWT authentication, session management, password hashing (bcrypt)

controls.requirement: Entity restricts transmission, removal, and removal of information
controls.aws_implementation: TLS 1.2+ for all communications, KMS encryption for data at rest, encrypted backups
controls.implementation_service: AWS Certificate Manager, KMS, RDS, S3
controls.evidence: SSL certificate validation, KMS key policy review

controls.requirement: Entity selects, develops, and evaluates and adjusts monitoring procedures
controls.aws_implementation: CloudWatch logs, CloudTrail audit logging, VPC Flow Logs, custom metrics

controls.requirement: Entity monitors system components and the operation of those components
controls.aws_implementation: CloudWatch alarms (CPU, memory, errors), anomaly detection

controls.requirement: Entity identifies, analyzes, and investigates changes, events, and exceptions
controls.aws_implementation: CloudWatch Insights for log analysis, incident response playbook, RCA process

controls.requirement: Entity evaluates monitoring procedures for effectiveness
controls.aws_implementation: Monthly review of CloudWatch metrics, incident post-mortems, metrics analysis

controls.requirement: Entity obtains or generates information, and communicates relevant information
controls.aws_implementation: Change log, AWS CloudTrail audit, deployment runbook
controls.evidence: CloudTrail event logs, Git commit history

controls.requirement: Entity selects, develops, evaluates, and adjusts activities to respond to identified changes
controls.aws_implementation: Change management process, code review, staging environment validation
controls.evidence: Change management SOP, code review records

controls.requirement: Entity selects, develops, evaluates, and adjusts monitoring procedures
controls.aws_implementation: CloudWatch alarms, SNS notifications, incident response playbook

controls.requirement: The entity restricts access to sensitive information to authorized internal and external users and processes
controls.aws_implementation: IAM policies, security groups, encryption, VPC isolation
controls.evidence: IAM policy audit, security group rules

controls.requirement: The entity disposes of information to meet the entity's objectives related to confidentiality
controls.aws_implementation: Data deletion procedures (right to erasure), S3 versioning, backup retention
controls.implementation_service: RDS, S3 lifecycle policies, AWS Backup

controls.requirement: The entity obtains or generates, uses, and maintains relevant, accurate, and complete information
controls.aws_implementation: Input validation, database constraints, transaction logging

controls.requirement: The entity obtains or generates information and maintains the integrity of that information
controls.aws_implementation: Database transaction logs, CloudTrail audit logging, version control

controls.requirement: The entity obtains or generates, uses, and maintains relevant, accurate, and complete information
controls.aws_implementation: Multi-AZ deployment, Auto Scaling, RDS failover, health checks
controls.implementation_service: RDS Aurora, EC2 Auto Scaling, ALB

controls.requirement: The entity acquires, protects, and maintains the resources needed
controls.aws_implementation: Right-sizing instances, monitoring capacity, auto-scaling policies

benchmarks.title: Maintain current contact details
benchmarks.recommendation: Ensure that current contact information is present in the AWS account
benchmarks.implementation: Configure account contact information (billing, security, operations)

benchmarks.title: Ensure security contact information is registered
benchmarks.recommendation: Designate a security contact who will receive alerts
benchmarks.implementation: Set security contact email

benchmarks.title: Ensure security questions are registered in the AWS account
benchmarks.recommendation: Configure backup contact information
benchmarks.implementation: Enable security questions

benchmarks.title: Ensure no root user access key exists
benchmarks.recommendation: The root user should not have access keys
benchmarks.implementation: Delete any root user access keys; use root account only for initial setup
benchmarks.evidence: IAM credential report showing no root keys

benchmarks.title: Ensure MFA is enabled for all IAM users
benchmarks.recommendation: Enable multi-factor authentication for all IAM users
benchmarks.implementation: Configure MFA for root, all admins, and developers (virtual or hardware MFA)

benchmarks.title: Ensure hardware MFA is enabled for the root account
benchmarks.recommendation: Use hardware MFA for root account (YubiKey, Gemalto, etc.)
benchmarks.implementation: Register hardware MFA device with root account

benchmarks.title: Eliminate use of the root account
benchmarks.recommendation: Do not use root account for day-to-day operations
benchmarks.implementation: Create IAM admin role; use that instead of root
benchmarks.evidence: CloudTrail logs showing no root activity (post-setup)

benchmarks.title: Implement MFA delete on S3 bucket versioning
benchmarks.recommendation: Require MFA authentication for deletion of versioned S3 objects
benchmarks.implementation: Enable MFA delete on S3 buckets (via root account, Terraform)

benchmarks.title: Ensure IAM policies are attached only to groups or roles
benchmarks.recommendation: Do not attach policies directly to users
benchmarks.implementation: Create roles for AppServer, AdminServer, LambdaFunction; attach policies to roles only

benchmarks.title: Ensure IAM policies are attached only to groups
benchmarks.recommendation: Prefer attaching policies to groups instead of individual users
benchmarks.implementation: Create groups (AppServers, DBAdmins, Developers); assign users to groups

benchmarks.title: Ensure CloudTrail is enabled in the AWS account
benchmarks.recommendation: Enable CloudTrail to record API calls and AWS account activity
benchmarks.implementation: Create trail in all regions; log to S3 bucket with versioning enabled

benchmarks.title: Ensure CloudTrail log file validation is enabled
benchmarks.recommendation: Enable log file integrity validation to detect tampering
benchmarks.implementation: Enable CloudTrail log file validation

benchmarks.title: Ensure CloudTrail logging for key AWS API calls is enabled
benchmarks.recommendation: Monitor critical AWS API calls (IAM changes, RDS modifications, S3 access)
benchmarks.implementation: CloudTrail captures all API calls by default; set up CloudWatch alarms for sensitive operations

benchmarks.title: Ensure CloudTrail trails are integrated with CloudWatch Logs
benchmarks.recommendation: Stream CloudTrail logs to CloudWatch for real-time analysis
benchmarks.implementation: Configure CloudTrail to deliver logs to CloudWatch Logs group; set up filters and alarms

benchmarks.title: Ensure AWS Config is enabled
benchmarks.recommendation: Enable AWS Config to track resource configurations and compliance
benchmarks.implementation: Enable AWS Config; set up config rules for CIS benchmarks

benchmarks.title: Ensure S3 bucket access logging is enabled on the CloudTrail S3 bucket
benchmarks.recommendation: Enable S3 logging to detect unauthorized access to audit logs
benchmarks.implementation: Enable S3 access logging on CloudTrail bucket; store logs in separate bucket

benchmarks.title: Ensure CloudTrail logs are encrypted at rest using KMS
benchmarks.recommendation: Use customer-managed KMS keys to encrypt CloudTrail logs
benchmarks.implementation: Configure CloudTrail to use KMS CMK for encryption

benchmarks.title: Ensure VPC Flow Logs is enabled
benchmarks.recommendation: Enable VPC Flow Logs to capture network traffic information
benchmarks.implementation: Enable VPC Flow Logs for all subnets; deliver to CloudWatch Logs

benchmarks.title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for unauthorized API calls
benchmarks.recommendation: Monitor for UnauthorizedOperation errors in CloudTrail
benchmarks.implementation: Create metric filter for 'UnauthorizedOperation' errors; set SNS alarm

benchmarks.title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for console login failures
benchmarks.recommendation: Monitor failed console login attempts
benchmarks.implementation: Create metric filter for 'ConsoleLogin' with failed status

benchmarks.title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for IAM policy changes
benchmarks.recommendation: Monitor for IAM policy modifications
benchmarks.implementation: Create metric filter for 'Put*Policy' and 'Delete*Policy' events

benchmarks.title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for CloudTrail configuration changes
benchmarks.recommendation: Monitor changes to CloudTrail settings
benchmarks.implementation: Create metric filter for CloudTrail modification events

benchmarks.title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for KMS key deletion
benchmarks.recommendation: Monitor for KMS key deletion or disablement
benchmarks.implementation: Create metric filter for KMS key state changes

benchmarks.title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for RDS cluster modifications
benchmarks.recommendation: Monitor RDS configuration changes
benchmarks.implementation: Create metric filter for RDS ModifyDBCluster events

benchmarks.title: Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 22
benchmarks.recommendation: Restrict SSH access to specific IPs
benchmarks.implementation: Bastion host for SSH; app SG allows port 8080 only from ALB

benchmarks.title: Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 3389
benchmarks.recommendation: Restrict RDP access (if using Windows instances)
benchmarks.implementation: Not applicable (Linux only); document in security review

benchmarks.title: Ensure VPC Flow Logs is enabled for every VPC
benchmarks.recommendation: Enable VPC Flow Logs (covered in 2.8)
benchmarks.implementation: Enable VPC Flow Logs

benchmarks.title: Ensure Network ACLs allow necessary inbound traffic only
benchmarks.recommendation: Configure NACLs with deny rules by default
benchmarks.implementation: Configure NACLs for public subnets (allow 80, 443 inbound); private subnets restrict to VPC CIDR

benchmarks.title: Ensure all data in Amazon S3 is encrypted
benchmarks.recommendation: Enable S3 encryption with customer-managed KMS keys
benchmarks.implementation: Enable default encryption on S3 buckets using KMS CMK

benchmarks.title: Ensure RDS database instances have encryption enabled
benchmarks.recommendation: Enable RDS encryption at rest
benchmarks.implementation: Enable RDS Aurora encryption with KMS CMK

benchmarks.title: Ensure EBS volumes are encrypted
benchmarks.recommendation: Enable EBS encryption for all volumes
benchmarks.implementation: Enable default EBS encryption; use KMS CMK

benchmarks.title: Ensure all traffic uses TLS 1.2 or higher
benchmarks.recommendation: Use TLS 1.2+ for all data in transit
benchmarks.implementation: Configure ALB with TLS 1.2+ listener policy; disable older versions
benchmarks.evidence: ALB listener policy, SSL certificate config

gdpr_compliance_mapping.gdpr_article: Article 5 - Principles relating to processing of personal data
gdpr_compliance_mapping.requirement: Lawfulness, fairness, transparency, purpose limitation, data minimization, accuracy, integrity, confidentiality, accountability
gdpr_compliance_mapping.aws_implementation: Data governance policy, encryption (TLS 1.2+, KMS), multi-AZ storage for integrity, audit logging (CloudTrail), DPA with AWS

gdpr_compliance_mapping.requirement: Processing must be lawful (consent, contract, legal obligation, vital interests, public task, or legitimate interests)
gdpr_compliance_mapping.aws_implementation: Not AWS responsibility; application must implement consent management, T&Cs display, cookie banners

gdpr_compliance_mapping.gdpr_article: Article 13/14 - Information to be provided where personal data are collected
gdpr_compliance_mapping.requirement: Provide privacy notice (data categories, purpose, recipients, retention, rights)
gdpr_compliance_mapping.aws_implementation: AWS does not store PII; application responsible for privacy notices

gdpr_compliance_mapping.gdpr_article: Article 17 - Right to erasure (Right to be forgotten)
gdpr_compliance_mapping.requirement: Data subject can request deletion; data must be deleted (with exceptions)
gdpr_compliance_mapping.aws_implementation: Application implements deletion logic; RDS supports cascading deletes; S3 object deletion; backups deleted after retention period
gdpr_compliance_mapping.evidence: Deletion API, RDS cascade rules, S3 lifecycle policies

gdpr_compliance_mapping.gdpr_article: Article 25 - Data protection by design and by default
gdpr_compliance_mapping.requirement: Privacy and security measures must be built into systems from design phase
gdpr_compliance_mapping.aws_implementation: Multi-AZ RDS for resilience, encryption by default (KMS), least-privilege IAM, security groups restrict access, DPA with AWS

gdpr_compliance_mapping.requirement: Implement appropriate technical and organizational measures (encryption, testing, monitoring, incident response)
gdpr_compliance_mapping.aws_implementation: TLS encryption, KMS encryption at rest, VPC isolation, CloudTrail audit logging, VPC Flow Logs, incident response playbook
gdpr_compliance_mapping.evidence: Security controls document, incident response playbook

gdpr_compliance_mapping.gdpr_article: Article 33 - Notification of a personal data breach
gdpr_compliance_mapping.requirement: Notify supervisory authority within 72 hours of discovering a breach (unless unlikely to create risk)
gdpr_compliance_mapping.aws_implementation: CloudWatch alarms for suspicious activity, incident response playbook with escalation procedures

gdpr_compliance_mapping.gdpr_article: Article 34 - Communication of a personal data breach to the data subject
gdpr_compliance_mapping.requirement: Communicate breach details to affected data subjects without undue delay (if high risk)
gdpr_compliance_mapping.aws_implementation: Application responsibility; AWS provides incident investigation tools (CloudTrail, CloudWatch Logs)

gdpr_compliance_mapping.gdpr_article: Article 37 - Designation of Data Protection Officer
gdpr_compliance_mapping.requirement: Appoint DPO where required by law (e.g., public authorities)
gdpr_compliance_mapping.aws_implementation: Not AWS responsibility; organization determines if DPO is needed

gdpr_compliance_mapping.requirement: If transferring data outside EU, must have appropriate safeguards (DPA, Standard Contractual Clauses)
gdpr_compliance_mapping.aws_implementation: Data residency: eu-west-1 (Ireland) only; no transfer outside EU without explicit decision; DPA with AWS covers AWS processors

implementation: ALB listener: HTTPS only (port 443), disable HTTP or redirect to HTTPS
Database connections: RDS in-transit encryption enabled
Redis: TLS enabled for EC2 to ElastiCache
API calls: Always use HTTPS (enforce via WAF)
S3: Default encryption with customer-managed KMS key
RDS Aurora: Encryption with customer-managed KMS key
RDS Snapshots: Encrypted (inherited from DB encryption)
EBS Volumes: Encrypted with KMS key
ElastiCache Redis: In-transit encryption (TLS); at-rest encryption via KMS
at_rest.key_management: Customer-managed KMS keys (not AWS-managed); allow RDS, S3, Lambda, EC2 service roles to use key

encryption_strategy.backup_encryption: RDS automated backups encrypted; cross-region backup in eu-central-1 also encrypted

cloudtrail.configuration: All regions trail enabled; logs to S3 with versioning + MFA delete
cloudtrail.log_validation: CloudTrail log file validation enabled (detect tampering)
cloudtrail.cloudwatch_integration: CloudTrail logs delivered to CloudWatch Logs for real-time analysis
cloudtrail.encryption: S3 encryption with KMS; CloudTrail uses customer-managed key
cloudtrail.monitoring: CloudWatch alarms for critical events (IAM changes, KMS operations, root activity)

cloudwatch.metrics: CPU, memory, network, errors, latency, cache hit ratio, inventory sync latency
cloudwatch.alarms: High CPU, high error rate, RDS replication lag, cache evictions
cloudwatch.dashboards: Real-time monitoring dashboard for on-call team
cloudwatch.log_insights: CloudWatch Logs Insights for ad-hoc queries, forensic analysis

vpc_flow_logs.use_case: Detect unauthorized traffic, analyze network patterns, troubleshoot connectivity

iam_roles.note: Least-privilege: no wildcard ARNs, no * actions
Admin role; MFA required to assume

mfa_requirements: Admin users: Virtual or hardware MFA

activities.description: Validate that controls CC5.1-9, C1, I1, A1 are operational
Run AWS Config rules for CIS compliance; fix any non-compliant settings
Verify all data stored in eu-west-1 (no cross-region without encryption & consent)
Confirm CloudTrail capturing all API calls; test log file validation
activities.deliverable: CloudTrail audit log sample + validation test

activities.description: Review KMS key policies; ensure proper permissions; test key rotation
activities.deliverable: KMS key policy review + rotation test

success_criteria: All SOC 2 controls documented with evidence
CIS AWS Foundations audit: 0 Critical findings, <5 High findings
CloudTrail: All API calls captured, log file validation enabled
Encryption: 100% of sensitive data encrypted in transit and at rest
